items.descriptionHtml:
Product SME (Cash Management & Digital Channels)

Experience: 8–12 years


Role Overview

We are seeking experienced Product Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) with strong functional expertise in Cash Management products and Digital Banking Channels. The role involves supporting product strategy, solution design, and stakeholder engagement within Corporate Banking.


Key Responsibilities

  • Act as a Product SME for Cash Management offerings including Payments, Collections, Virtual Accounts, and Liquidity Management.
  • Provide functional expertise across Digital Channels such as Web, API, Host‑to‑Host (H2H), and SWIFT.
  • Support product design, enhancement, and rollout initiatives aligned with business and client needs.
  • Collaborate with technology, digital, operations, and business teams to drive product effectiveness.
  • Support solution discussions, client engagements, and internal stakeholders with subject‑matter inputs.


Required Skills & Experience

  • 8–12 years of experience in Corporate Banking / Transaction Banking products.
  • Strong hands‑on knowledge of Cash Management and Digital Banking platforms.
  • Ability to work as a product expert in complex, multi‑stakeholder environments.
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

items.descriptionHtml:
About the Company

D.P. Abhushan Ltd. is a trusted and renowned name in the Indian gems and jewellery industry, known for its exquisite craftsmanship, legacy of trust, and commitment to delivering timeless designs. With a strong presence in Central India, we are expanding our retail footprint and seeking passionate professionals to join our growing team.


About the Role

We are looking for a dynamic, data-driven Product & Category Strategist to own our design life cycle. You will bridge the gap between artistic design, manufacturing excellence, and commercial profitability.

If you have a sharp eye for jewelry aesthetics and a proven track record of driving margin growth, we want to hear from you!


Key Responsibilities (What You Will Do):

  • Own the Strategy: Drive the development and execution of end-to-end product strategies and vision.
  • Analyze the Market: Conduct deep-dive market analysis to spot emerging trends and benchmark competitor offerings.
  • Curate Collections: Coordinate directly with manufacturing partners and design teams to launch stunning collections.
  • Maximize Profitability: Drive margin growth by balancing high-end design aesthetics with strict product profitability ratios.
  • Data-Driven Design: Manage the entire design life cycle seamlessly in coordination with our analytics function.
  • Empower Retail Teams: Deliver high-impact product training to ensure retail teams can tell the collection's story.


Pre-requisites (What You Bring):

  • Experience: Minimum 3+ years in Category Management, Product Development (NPD), or Design at a jewelry retail or B2B firm.
  • Portfolio: A strong, diverse portfolio showcasing both lightweight and heavyweight jewelry designs.
  • Education: Graduate from a premier Design School; NIFT graduates are highly preferred.
  • Tech Skills: Proficiency in MS Excel, PowerPoint, and Canva graphic designing.

Company Description

Experian unlocks the power of data to create opportunities for consumers, businesses and society. We gather and analyse data in ways others can't. We help individuals take financial control and access financial services, businesses make smarter decision and succeed, lenders lend more responsibly, and organisations prevent identity fraud and crime. For more than 125 years, we've helped consumers and clients prosper, and economies and communities flourish – and we're not done. Our 17,800 people in 45 countries believe the possibilities for you, and our world, are growing. We're investing in new technologies, experienced people and new ideas so we can help create a better tomorrow.

Job Description

Experian is looking for smart product management professionals to be a part of our Credit Services business. In the role of Product Manager, you will be responsible for understanding existing solutions & help market those. Your exposure to product management in retail lending products will differentiate you from the rest. Being among the Top 100 ‘The most innovative Companies of 2014 by Forbes’; Experian India provides data, analytical and marketing services to enable organizations to make and execute better business decisions. Experian is a global leader in harnessing information and using it to empower businesses and consumers. We are dedicated to helping people and organizations make sense of complex data, using our expertise in data and analytics we can provide you with insight into customer relationships to help you make informed business and marketing decisions.

What You’ll Need To Bring To The Party

  • Work on existing solutions - Understand existing solutions, work on development, marketing and distribution along with sales team. Provide regular training to the sales teams on these existing solutions.
  • Review and upgrade existing products (Experian Scores, Trend Insights Reports & Credit Reports) when necessary
  • Work on new product design – an ability to understand the business users problem statement and be able to use Experian Bureau information to create an Analytical or Platform solutions. Align with Technology, Legal, Compliance, Marketing and other support teams to create the product and implement it.
  • Extensive Reporting and trend analysis of Lending market

Qualifications

  • MBA from reputed institute / MA Economics with 4-7 years of experience in the banking and financial services industry
  • We are looking for a Product Manager who has experience of working closely with Business or Credit Risk teams of a Bank/NBFC and supporting the function with data led solutions
  • A Business Insights Manager, someone who has hands on experience of working with data and is able to use data to solve business objectives ; someone with a keen eye for data trends & emerging insights
  • Experience with Business Analytics Unit of a Bank/NBFC will be relevant
  • Added advantage if you are well versed with BI tools like Tableau, Qlik etc.
  • An understanding of credit scores – as a developer and/or user will be relevant
  • Should have good comprehension skills, ability to multi -task and excellent presentation skills Strong Project management skills.

Additional Information

Role Location: Mumbai

items.descriptionHtml:
Product Manager – Solar Lighting


The Product Management function is a pivotal function as it sits at the intersection of lighting expertise, technology and business needs to bring transformational products to market. In this role, you will be responsible business strategy as well as lifecycle management of products.

You will be required to work closely with the BU leadership, Technology, Purchase and Business Development team to develop lighting products for solar application, working with end customer for approval, establishing integrator ecosystem and deliver as per customer requirement. It will also involve working closely with our client facing teams and end-customers for implementation of proofs of concept projects, gathering insights and planning future product development.


Job Description

  • Understanding current market for solar and developing product strategy and developing suitable roadmap
  • Identify market requirements, translate them into product requirements, and collaborate with technology, quality, operations & support teams to drive execution
  • Ensure that features are correctly scoped, designed, built and launched on time
  • Responsible for product launch with necessary communication support
  • Ongoing product support, enhancements and life cycle management for existing products
  • Work with business development team to propagate the use of products
  • Monitor execution against both the roadmap and on business commitments
  • Responsible for top line and bottom line for the segment
  • Managing pricing for projects and offering innovative solutions
  • Presentations to architects, consultants and end customer explaining the product positioning and differentiation.
  • Product training of stakeholders viz, sales team, distributors of features and positioning.


Skills & Experience

  • Electrical or Electronics Engineering. MBA will be preferred.
  • Domain expertise of Min 6-10 yrs in solar related products – knowledge of product management methods and tools used in translating needs into features and benefits.
  • Min 3-5 yrs experience on product management
  • Result oriented mindset to achieve business targets
  • Focused approach in understanding and developing profitable strategies
  • Ability to work with cross functional teams.
  • Awareness of trends in the market related to new emerging technology
  • Strong technical, Process and problem-solving proficiency.
  • Unparalleled attention to detail, multitasking and organizational capacity.
  • Demonstrated business acumen, and cross collaboration capabilities.
  • Ability to set and deliver on priorities and deal with a degree of ambiguity.
  • A solid grasp of Product management skills.
  • Exceptional interpersonal and communications capabilities.

JOB DESCRIPTION


Product Manager Direct to Consumer

Experian is looking for smart product management professionals to be a part of our Credit Services business. In the role of Product Manager, you will be responsible for understanding existing solutions & help market those. Your exposure to product management in retail lending products with credit institutions and/or fintech organizations will differentiate you from the rest.


Being among the Top 100 ‘The most innovative Companies of 2014 by Forbes’; Experian India provides data, insights & analytical services to enable organizations to make and execute better business decisions. Experian is a global leader in harnessing information and using it to empower businesses and consumers. We are dedicated to helping people and organizations make sense of complex data. Using our expertise in data and analytics we can provide you with insight into customer relationships to help you make informed business and marketing decisions.


What you need to have


  • MBA/Engineers from reputed institute with 3-6 years of experience in the banking and financial services industry and/or financial technology.
  • We are looking for a Product Manager who has experience of working closely with Business or Credit Risk teams of a Bank/NBFC and supporting the function with data led solutions.
  • Someone with a strong experience in building digital banking/financial solutions/products especially for direct to consumer platforms.
  • Adept at designing, building & performance managing for effective consumer journeys across channels like website, mobile and other form factors.
  • Who has techno commercial experience in the BFSI space (some coding exposure and understanding of platforms, APIs & microservices)
  • Someone who has hands on experience of working with data and can solve related business challenges.
  • Someone with a keen eye for consumer trends & insights.
  • Experience with Business Analytics Unit of a Bank/NBFC will be useful.
  • Added advantage if you are well versed with BI tools like Tableau, Qlik etc.
  • An understanding of credit scores.
  • Experience and ability to evaluate and manage partnerships is important.
  • Should have good comprehension skills, ability to multi -task and excellent Presentation Skills strong Product Development, Project Management skills.


What you will do


  • Journey Management for Consumers
  • Profitably Growing the D2C consumer base
  • New Product Ideation + Development for leveraging consumer base
  • Project Management [RFP, BRD, Scoping, Execution]
  • People Management & Vendor Management
  • Code Integration
  • Solutioning
  • Go to Market Strategy
  • Portfolio Revenue Management & building credit awareness programs
  • Compliance, Legal & Infosec interventions
  • Train frontline and stakeholders
  • Presales support
  • Collaborate to resolve and deliver objectives



Who you need to be

  • Collaborative (managing expectations and personalities)
  • With Action Bias
  • Assertive
  • Solution Oriented
  • Strategic/Tactical where required
  • Revenue focused
  • Resourceful, Honest, Ethical
  • Gracious & Adaptable
  • Acts with empathy
  • Carries people with them
  • Able to Work to under compelling situations/deadlines


Interested candidates share their CV to daylene.dias@experian.com

Role Summary

Do you want to make an impact on patient health around the world? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment that brings together scientific, clinical and commercial domains together through data and analytics?

Pfizer is seeking a senior leader in AI & Data Science to build and lead a best-in-class team focused on AI accelerators within commercial analytics. This role is responsible for hands-on development and deployment of Agentic and LLM products & solutions, to support faster, proactive, and insight‑driven human decision‑making. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in ML/LLM/Agentic with a strong consulting and product management background. You will collaborate cross-functionally to empower agentic AI led decision-making, accelerate business transformation, and deliver measurable business impact.

This role sits at the intersection of business strategy, data, and AI, and is responsible for defining what to build and why, ensuring the accelerators delivers measurable business value across markets and use cases.

Role Responsibilities

Product Strategy & Vision

  • Define and drive the product vision, roadmap, and priorities for Agentic Platforms
  • Translate business needs into clear, actionable product requirements
  • Ensure alignment with commercial strategy and leadership expectations

Use Case Definition & Value Realization

  • Identify and prioritize high-impact decision use cases
  • Define business outcomes, success metrics, and ROI
  • Continuously track value realization and adoption

Cross-Functional Leadership

  • Act as the central orchestrator across:
  • Decision Architects
  • Agentic Engineering
  • Data & Semantic teams
  • UX & Market teams &
  • Drive alignment across business and technology stakeholders

Product Backlog & Delivery Ownership

  • Own and manage the product backlog and release planning
  • Define epics, user stories, and acceptance criteria
  • Ensure timely and high-quality delivery in collaboration with engineering teams

Stakeholder Management & Communication

  • Engage with senior commercial leaders and global stakeholders
  • Lead product demos, feedback loops, and prioritization discussions
  • Drive decision-making with clarity and data-backed insights

Adoption & Scaling

  • Work with market teams to drive adoption, training, and feedback loops
  • Identify opportunities to scale use cases across brands and geographies

Required Experience

  • 10+ years of experience in Product Management / Product Ownership, preferably in data, analytics, or AI-driven products
  • Strong experience working with cross-functional teams (business + tech + data)
  • Proven track record of delivering complex, enterprise-grade platforms
  • Experience in commercial analytics, pharma, or healthcare is highly preferred
  • Familiarity with AI/ML or GenAI/Agentic systems is a strong plus

Technical Skills

  • Proficient in Python and/or R, with solid understanding of advanced statistics
  • Strong hands-on experience in ML/LLM/Agentic platform development & deployment
  • Knowledge of API, MCP, cloud environments and data engineering workflows
  • Agentic Workflows ( multi step reasoning, reinforcement, Eval etc )

Business & Domain Skills

  • Proven ability to translate data insights into commercial recommendations
  • Understanding of marketing intelligence, third party pharma data, media planning, budget optimization
  • Knowledge of pharma markets, HCP/DTP promotion strategy, and compliance
  • Ability to partner with marketing, finance, brand teams to influence decisions
  • Experience presenting to C-suite and senior leadership

What Makes This Role Unique

  • Opportunity to build a next-generation agentic decision platform
  • Direct exposure to senior leadership and strategic decision-making
  • High ownership and visibility across global markets
  • Chance to shape the future of AI-driven commercial intelligence

Work Location Assignment: Hybrid

Pfizer is an equal opportunity employer and complies with all applicable equal employment opportunity legislation in each jurisdiction in which it operates.

Summary
The people here at Apple don’t just build products— they craft the kind of wonder that has revolutionized entire industries. It’s the diversity of those people and their ideas that inspires the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts. Imagine what you could do here. When you join Apple, you help us leave the world better than we found it. A job at Apple is unlike any other you’ve had. You will be challenged. You will be inspired. And you’ll be proud! At Apple, great ideas have a way of becoming great products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish!

Inclusion is a shared responsibility and we work together to foster a culture where everyone belongs and is inspired to do their best work. Come and do the best and most exciting work of your career at Apple!

Description
iCloud is built into every Apple device. It keeps your photos, videos, notes, and more safe, automatically backed up, and available anywhere you go. iCloud+, get you even more storage and enhanced privacy features that protect you and your data. It’s all the power of iCloud!

We are seeking a dynamic, highly motivated leader to define and drive the product-centric strategy and business performance of iCloud+ across Indian markets, spanning multiple routes to market.

This role combines strategic ownership with operational rigour: driving continuous product improvement, leveraging business and market analytics, and translating insights into clear, high-impact actions. The successful candidate will bring a strong product intuition alongside commercial acumen, enabling them to identify, shape, and execute strategic opportunities that accelerate subscription growth and overall business performance.

To be truly successful in this role, this individual will need to have an undeniably strong passion for Apple products, desire to win, curiosity to be better, finesse and craft in product storytelling, creative problem solving, the motivation to inspire others and to build strong relationships throughout the organisation.

Responsibilities
  • Articulate and shape the opportunity ahead for iCloud+ and communicate requirements for current and future products in a coherent way to multiple stakeholders Worldwide.
  • Possess expert knowledge of market trends, competitive and 3rd party products and strategies. Make recommendations on key growth opportunities to management and cross-functional teams.
  • Define the strategy and the annual plan, outlining opportunities and actions that drive growth and category leadership.
  • Be the liaison between India and Worldwide for all local business needs and feature requirements. Influence the product feature roadmap, making clear recommendations that improve customer experience and commercial performance.
  • Be commercially focused and deliver on strategic business opportunities to drive subscriptions and growth.
  • Build, maintain and expand business relationships with established and prospective partners.
  • Balance deadlines and work effectively with cross-functional teams. Build a sphere of influence across cross-functional teams.
  • Maintain outstanding attention to detail and obsess over the customer experience.

Minimum Qualifications
  • Bachelor’s degree plus at least 15 years of experience delivering business growth in the digital world
  • Strong understanding of consumer tech landscape, subscription economics in the region with deep passion for mobile technology.
  • Extensive work experience in tech, if possible in the Cloud industry vertical, with depth in technical awareness and the instinctive ability to be the voice of the consumer.
  • A consistent track record for driving strategic business growth, subscriptions and business development with partners in the telco, retail and finance industries.
  • An ability to analyse and communicate results clearly and effectively to leaders, and influence senior leaders through story telling.
  • Excellent analytical, presentation and negotiation skills.
  • Spoken and written English fluency.

Preferred Qualifications
  • MBA preferred but not conditional.
  • Positive attitude and strong ability to work internationally with a variety of teams and personalities collaboratively across timezones.
  • Prior work with international teams in a multi-national company is a plus.

At Apple, we believe accessibility is a fundamental human right. You’ll find that idea reflected in everything here — in our culture, our benefits and our digital tools. By welcoming as many perspectives as possible, we help you build a career where you feel like you belong.

Learn about accessibility in Apple’s workplace

The Leader will own the strategy and execution of a simplified enterprise-grade data platform that advances data maturity, strengthens data quality and governance, and accelerates business-unit agility. Drive a lean, federated operating model that balances centralized platform capabilities and guardrails with autonomy for business units to move quickly. The role focuses on platform simplification, automation, and enabling prioritized use cases through trusted, reusable data products.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and deliver the global roadmap for a cloud-scale, governed data platform (Lakehouse/data mesh patterns) that simplify the legacy platforms, reduces tool and pipeline redundancy and improves data maturity across MedTech.

  • Design and implement policy-based self-service access patterns (data marketplace) that simplify consumption while implementing compliance.
  • Co-Lead the MedTech Data Office, drive federated governance and stewardship with clear enterprise policies and BU accountability; institutionalize data quality critical metrics, automated monitoring and remediation workflows.

  • 15+ years of progressive IT leadership with major accountability for Data & Analytics and platform delivery in regulated industries (MedTech, life sciences, or equivalent).
  • Consistent record building and running enterprise-scale data platforms (cloud-native, Lakehouse, data mesh) and delivering shared capabilities across global organizations.
  • Hands-on and strategic mastery of cloud platforms (Azure and AWS) and modern data architectures (data Lakehouse/warehouse, feature stores, streaming, APIs).
  • Demonstrated success operationalizing federated data governance, metadata/lineage, and data quality within a product-oriented model.
  • Experience embedding AI/ML and GenAI into platform services and operations (automation, intelligent workflows, quality monitoring).
  • Leadership experience in Master Data Management and integration across ERP/CRM landscapes.
  • Strong executive presence with a history of influencing senior stakeholders in sophisticated, matrixed, global organizations.
  • Outcome-focused decision maker: prioritizes investments, defines business-aligned goals and milestones, and measures value delivery.
  • Hands-on knowledge of privacy, security, and data risk controls in regulated environments; experienced with compliance-driven controls and audits.
  • Demonstrated FinOps and cost-optimization experience for large-scale data platforms.

This position may require up to 20% domestic and international travel.

items.descriptionHtml:
Our client is a B2B Marketplace. As a Group Product Manager, you will not just manage products - you will own a business line. You will be responsible for driving GMV growth, margin expansion, and capital efficiency across multiple interconnected product surfaces, at a time when the company is scaling rapidly and preparing for a public market trajectory.


Key Responsibilities:

1. Business-Backed Product Strategy

- Define and drive a multi-product roadmap tied directly to P&L outcomes (GMV, take-rate, margins, credit penetration, repeat behavior)

- Identify structural bottlenecks in commerce and supply chain flows, and convert them into product opportunities

- Balance growth vs. profitability vs. risk across product decisions

2. Building for Scale (0→1 and 1→10)

- Lead the development of new product lines from zero to scale, especially in underdigitized workflows

- Evolve existing products into high-throughput, reliable platforms handling complex logistics and financial dependencies

- Design systems that work in real-world, constraint-heavy environments (fragmented supply, price volatility, offline behavior)

3. Deep Customer & Market Translation

- Build a nuanced understanding of MSMEs, contractors, builders, and manufacturers

- Translate offline trust mechanisms, negotiation behaviors, and credit dependencies into digital product experiences

- Solve for adoption, trust, and repeat usage, not just feature delivery

4. Metrics-Driven Execution

- Define and own north-star and input metrics such as:

o GMV growth and quality

o Conversion and funnel efficiency

o Repeat purchase behavior

o Credit adoption and utilization

- Drive a culture of experimentation, iteration, and data-backed decision-making

5. Cross-Functional Leadership

- Lead multiple squads across engineering, design, data, operations, and business

- Act as the integrator across product, supply chain, and finance teams

- Influence senior stakeholders on trade-offs, priorities, and investment decisions

6. Team & Capability Building

- Mentor and scale a team of PMs/APMs

- Establish strong product thinking across teams—problem framing, prioritization, and execution rigor


Requirements:

1. 8–10+ years in product management with ownership of large, complex product areas

2. Experience in B2B platforms, marketplaces, supply chain tech, or fintech ecosystems

3. Demonstrated ability to drive measurable business outcomes, not just ship features

4. Strong execution depth in high-growth or scale-up environments

5. Ability to operate in ambiguous, operations-heavy contexts

items.descriptionHtml:
At Johnson & Johnson, we believe health is everything. Our strength in healthcare innovation empowers us to build a world where complex diseases are prevented, treated, and cured, where treatments are smarter and less invasive, and solutions are personal. Through our expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, we are uniquely positioned to innovate across the full spectrum of healthcare solutions today to deliver the breakthroughs of tomorrow, and profoundly impact health for humanity. Learn more at jnj.com.

As guided by Our Credo, Johnson & Johnson is responsible to our employees who work with us throughout the world. We provide an inclusive work environment where each person is considered as an individual. At Johnson & Johnson, we respect the diversity and dignity of our employees and recognize their merit.

Job Function

Technology Product & Platform Management

Job Sub Function

Multi-Family Technology Product & Platform Management

Job Category

People Leader

All Job Posting Locations:

Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

Job Description

We are searching for top talent for Director, MedTech Technology AI/DS Platforms, Innovation. This position can be based in the following locations:

Hybrid: Raritan, NJ; West Chester, PA; Mumbai, India

Remote candidates in CA, NJ, and PA will be considered on a case-by-case basis and if approved by the company.

Please note that this role is available across multiple countries and may be posted under different requisition numbers to comply with local requirements. While you are welcome to apply to any or all of the postings, we recommend focusing on the specific country(s) that align with your preferred location(s):

US: R-076738

India: R-077613

The Director AI & DS Platforms, Innovation will own the build, delivery, and operationalization of a secure, compliant, and scalable AI platform and AI product ecosystem that enables MedTech business units to deliver measurable, high‑impact AI & DS solutions. This role operates within a federated model: business units own outcomes and use cases while the enterprise platform provides reusable capabilities, governance, drive AI literacy and operational rigor to scale AI responsibly across the organization.

Key Responsibilities

  • Build and deliver the MedTech AI platform vision, roadmap, and operating model, ensuring alignment with strategic priorities.
  • Develop core capabilities in AI/ML, Generative AI, MLOps, and system integration.
  • Ensure platform architecture and operations align with security, privacy, and healthcare regulations.
  • Transform key business goals into scalable AI solutions, partnering with business leaders for impact.
  • Accelerate value with standardized frameworks, templates, and repeatable components.
  • Identify and operationalize platform services needed for multiple use cases to drive standardization and reuse.
  • Lead platform financial management, optimize costs and performance, and align investments with business outcomes.
  • Implement FinOps practices for efficient AI workload management and deliver visibility on costs and value.
  • Contribute towards enterprise AI governance, lead Responsible AI implementation, and ensure compliant innovation.
  • Advise leadership on AI strategy, risks, and opportunities, and apply product management practices to platform services.
  • Build and lead a high-performing, distributed team, developing technical and business skills in AI, data, and platform.
  • Develop a culture of innovation, inclusion, accountability, continuous learning, and drive AI literacy.

Qualifications

Required

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or a related field, or equivalent combination of education and experience.
  • 15+ years of progressive IT experience with substantial responsibility for Data & Analytics and platform delivery in regulated industries (life sciences, MedTech, or similar).
  • Demonstrated hands‑on and strategic expertise with cloud platforms (Azure and AWS) and modern data platform architectures (data Lakehouse/warehouse, feature stores, streaming, APIs).
  • Consistent track record leading large‑scale, enterprise transformation programs and delivering production‑grade platform products (MLOps, data engineering, integration).
  • Strong understanding of regulatory, privacy, security, and commercial compliance considerations relevant to medical technology and healthcare.
  • Experience leading and developing high‑performing, geographically distributed, cross‑functional teams.
  • Excellent partner management, executive communication, collaboration, and critical thinking skills; proven track record to influence in a matrixed organization.
  • Outcomes‑focused mindset with strong organizational change, problem solving, and continuous improvement orientation.

Preferred

  • Cross‑functional experience partnering across Commercial, R&D, and Supply Chain functions.
  • Familiarity with Generative AI, model governance, Responsible AI practices, and production MLOps.
  • Experience with FinOps, cloud cost optimization, and vendor management for large platform estates.
  • Prior experience in MedTech, medical devices, pharmaceuticals, or life sciences.

This position may require up to 20% domestic and international travel.

Required Skills

Preferred Skills:

Business Alignment, Business Architecture, Business Process Design, Business Savvy, Computer Programming, Developing Others, Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Inclusive Leadership, Leadership, Platform as a Service (PaaS), Product Knowledge, Program Management, Software Development Management, Strategic Change, Succession Planning, Tactical Planning, Technical Credibility

items.descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Experian unlocks the power of data to create opportunities for consumers, businesses and society. We gather, analyze and process data in ways others can’t. We help individuals take financial control and access financial services, businesses make smarter decision and thrive, lenders lend more responsibly, and organizations prevent identity fraud and crime. For more than 125 years, we’ve helped consumers and clients prosper, and economies and communities flourish – and we’re not done. Our 17,800 people in 45 countries believe the possibilities for you, and our world, are growing. We’re investing in new technologies, talented people and innovation so we can help create a better tomorrow.

Job Description

Experian India is seeking a strategic and visionary senior leader to head its Fraud and ID Verification Solutions team. This client-facing role is central to driving solution excellence, market leadership, and product innovation in the financial services sector. The ideal candidate will be a recognized expert in fraud prevention and identity verification, capable of translating client challenges into impactful solutions while influencing product strategy and market execution.

In today’s era of data-driven decision-making, Experian is uniquely positioned to solve client problems by being at the forefront of data analysis, solutioning, and innovation. Our platform-first approach enables seamless integration of data from multiple sources, creating a one-stop solution for the financial industry in India.

Key Responsibilities

Client Engagement & Strategic Solutioning

  • Lead a team of specialists to engage with clients, deeply understand their fraud and ID verification challenges, and strategically position Experian’s solutions to address these needs.
  • Collaborate with Sales teams on day-to-day sales activities, providing strategic guidance and solution expertise to support deal progression and closure.
  • Ensure that analytics-driven insights are embedded into client conversations and product evolution.
  • Ensure that proposed solutions are optimal, scalable, and aligned with client needs and regulatory frameworks.

Post-Sales Success & Adoption

  • Oversee the transition from sales to onboarding, ensuring smooth implementation and client satisfaction.
  • Drive client adoption and usage of solutions, acting as a strategic advisor to maximize value realization.

Product Feedback & Innovation

  • Serve as the voice of the customer to internal product teams, providing actionable insights on product performance and enhancement opportunities.
  • Influence the development of new features and capabilities based on client feedback and market trends.
  • Work closely with Experian’s highly proficient analytics teams to co-create innovative, data-led solutions.
  • Identify trends across liabilities and assets onboarding, spanning both consumer and MSME segments.
  • Leverage advanced analytics to address fraud not only from a consumer perspective but also through digital device footprints, behavioral signals, and emerging fraud typologies.

Go-To-Market Strategy

  • Partner with GTM and sales teams to launch new Fraud and ID Verification products.
  • Define target segments, positioning, messaging, and market entry strategies.
  • Support enablement and training of sales teams on new offerings.

Industry Leadership & Advocacy

  • Represent Experian at fraud forums, conferences, and industry events.
  • Establish Experian as the leading authority on fraud and ID verification in India’s financial services sector.
  • Build and maintain relationships with key stakeholders across banks, NBFCs, and regulatory bodies.

Community Building & Thought Leadership

  • Lead the planning and execution of the Annual Fraud Closed User Group Summit for Hunter platform users and industry leaders.
  • Manage the Hunter Advisory Board, a quarterly forum of top financial institutions to discuss product evolution and regulatory developments.

Cross-Functional Leadership

  • Collaborate across product, customer success, onboarding, analytics, and GTM teams to drive holistic client outcomes.
  • Inspire and lead a high-performing team of specialists, fostering a culture of excellence, accountability, and innovation.

Qualifications

Qualifications & Experience:

  • 15+ years of experience in fraud prevention, identity verification, or related domains within financial services or technology.
  • Proven experience in strategic client engagement and solutioning.
  • Strong understanding of the fraud landscape in India’s financial services sector.
  • Experience in product strategy, GTM planning, and cross-functional leadership.
  • Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and strategic thinking skills.
  • Prior experience in hosting industry summits or advisory boards is a plus.

What Success Looks Like

  • Strategic influence on sales outcomes and client satisfaction.
  • High adoption and usage rates post-implementation.
  • Strong market presence and thought leadership in the fraud domain.
  • Continuous product improvement driven by client insights.
  • Seamless collaboration across internal teams and external stakeholders.
  • Delivery of innovative, data-driven solutions that address emerging fraud patterns.

Why us

  • We’re a high-performance and driven team but we don’t forget to celebrate success
  • We offer strong career and international opportunities for high performers
  • We invest heavily in our products and our people
  • We offer training and support from experienced subject matter experts and managers plus dedicated learning & development time

Additional Information

  • We are looking for someone who:
  • Is a consultative business professional
  • Is confident, clear, certain and consistent
  • Is able to work alongside a sales team managing multiple opportunities concurrently
  • Passionate, resourceful, gracious and adaptable
  • High moral standards, honesty and an ethical approach to doing business
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving skills and ability to see the big-picture & develop conceptual solutions
  • Candidates that have prior relevant work experience, excel in ambiguous situations, and possess a passion for helping companies become more competitive
  • Business acumen combined with a comfort with technology is a must

Experian Careers - Creating a better tomorrow together

Find out what its like to work for Experian by clicking here

items.descriptionHtml:
About IKS Health

IKS Health is on a mission to enable the efficient delivery of high quality care through a combination of leading edge technology and human expertise. The IKS Care Enablement Platform enables us to deliver the chores of healthcare, across administrative, clinical, operational burdens, to enable clinicians to focus on their core Purpose: delivering great care and bringing joy and purpose back to medicine.


At IKS Health, we're redefining the future of Care Enablement and creating transformative value in healthcare by empowering clinicians to build healthier communities and enabling stronger, financially sustainable enterprises.


Our global team of 12,000+, including 600+ technologies and 2,600+ clinical staff, enables 150,000 clinicians to revitalize the clinician and patient experience. IKS Health is a trusted partner for more then 900 clients including the largest hospitals, health systems, and specialty groups across the United States.


Profile Overview

  • The AVP will be responsible for conceptualizing, developing, and scaling technology-enabled solutions within the Clinical Support Services (CSS) portfolio at IKS Health.
  • The role combines strategic ownership with hands-on execution, requiring the individual to define product vision and roadmap while actively driving both the development of new solutions and the expansion of existing products. Sitting at the intersection of product management, clinical workflow design, and client engagement, the role entails end-to-end ownership from problem discovery through commercialization and scale.
  • The individual will play a critical role in expanding the CSS product suite and driving measurable business growth.


Key Responsibilities

1. Product Strategy & Ownership

  • Define and drive product vision, strategy, and roadmap aligned with clinician enablement goals
  • Identify high-impact opportunities within US healthcare workflows
  • Conduct market research, client discovery, and competitive analysis
  • Prioritize initiatives based on client value, scalability, and business impact

2. Product Development & Execution

  • Own the end-to-end product lifecycle, including building new solutions (0→1) and scaling and expanding existing products (1→N), from ideation through launch, adoption, and continuous optimization
  • Translate customer needs into clear product requirements and specifications
  • Partner with engineering, data, and design teams to build scalable solutions
  • Ensure seamless integration with EHRs and client systems

3. Clinical Solution Design

  • Deconstruct complex clinical and administrative workflows into scalable solutions
  • Design hybrid models combining technology, automation, and human-in-the-loop processes
  • Develop SOPs, playbooks, and operational frameworks for scale
  • Leverage data and analytics to continuously improve performance

4. Commercialization & Growth

  • Partner with commercial teams to position and sell product capabilities
  • Develop business cases and ROI models for clients
  • Identify new revenue streams, product extensions, and cross-sell opportunities
  • Support client presentations, demos, and strategic discussions

5. Client Engagement

  • Engage with healthcare providers to understand operational challenges
  • Lead pilots and proof-of-concept implementations
  • Capture feedback and translate insights into product innovation and roadmap enhancements

6. Team Leadership

  • Lead and develop a team of product and solutioning professionals
  • Drive execution excellence across multiple concurrent initiatives
  • Mentor team members and build a high-performance, ownership-driven culture


Qualifications:

Experience

  • 12+ years of experience in product management or solutioning roles
  • 10+ years of experience in the US healthcare ecosystem, with strong exposure to provider-side clinical and administrative workflows
  • 6+ years of experience leading and managing teams
  • Proven experience building and scaling products in clinical workflow domains such as prescription management, provider inbox/clinical messaging, document management, or care coordination workflows
  • Experience designing and optimizing high-volume workflow systems (task routing, triage, automation, or operational inbox management)
  • Proven track record of owning and scaling products end-to-end (0→1 and 1→N), from ideation through launch, adoption, and expansion
  • Proven experience working with or integrating EHR systems, with strong preference for Epic, Oracle Health (Cerner), and MEDITECH
  • Strong experience in clinical workflow design and solutioning
  • Experience in managing P&L or driving revenue-linked product outcomes
  • Exposure to clinical operations, quality, or process excellence functions is a plus


Skills

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities
  • Ability to influence senior stakeholders and drive alignment
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills
  • Experience working in fast-paced, matrixed environments
  • Experience in quality/process excellence
  • Exposure to automation, AI-driven solutions, or digital health platforms



What We’re Looking For

  • Strong ownership mindset with a bias for action
  • Ability to operate in ambiguity and drive both 0→1 innovation and 1→N product scaling and expansion
  • Customer-first thinking with a focus on delivering measurable outcomes
  • A balance of strategic thinking and hands-on execution

items.descriptionHtml:
Responsibilities

Product Strategy & Development: -

  • Define and execute the ocean freight product strategy for both FCL and LCL services.

  • Innovative service offerings include value-added services and digital solutions.

  • Collaborate with sales and finance teams for pricing governance and approvals.

  • Drive automation, digitalization, and standardization of ocean freight processes.

Preferred Skills

  • Familiarity with digital freight platforms and TMS systems.
  • Experience working with global freight forwarders or NVOCCs.
  • Ability to manage cross-functional teams and drive change.
  • Strong commercial mindset with a customer-centric approach.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, International Business, or related field.
  • 15+ years of experience in ocean freight forwarding, product management, or carrier relations.
  • Strong understanding of global trade lanes, INCOTERMS, and shipping documentation.
  • Proven experience in pricing, procurement, and vendor negotiations.
  • Excellent leadership, analytical, and communication skills.

items.description: About the Company:At Playlist, life's richest moments happen when people step away from screens to move, connect, explore, and play. We're building the definitive platform for intentional living, connecting people with inspiring experiences in fitness, wellness, and beyond. With popular brands like Mindbody and ClassPass, Playlist empowers businesses and individuals, making it effortless for aspirations to become actions. Join us in reshaping technology's role to foster meaningful, real-world connections.The Role You’ll Play:At the intersection of technology and global wellness, you’ll lead our international payments expansion. This role is about more than integrations and regulations—it’s about creating seamless, compliant experiences that empower businesses to grow and thrive across borders. Define and lead our global payments expansion strategy, aligning PSP integrations, market priorities, and compliance milestones Launch local payment methods and regional PSPs across key markets, owning the process from evaluation to go-live Build expertise in complex regulatory frameworks (like PSD2, Verifactu, NF525, and e-Invoicing), ensuring we stay ahead of local requirements Partner with Engineering to shape the global payments stack, from multi-PSP orchestration to routing logic and risk controls Collaborate with Compliance, Finance, and GTM teams to streamline reconciliation, settlement, and cross-border payouts Set success metrics for payment acceptance, reliability, and cost efficiency across markets Represent Payments in global initiatives, championing international enablement across product and platform teams Stay plugged into global payments trends, using competitive insights to inform product direction and decision-making____________________________________________________________________________________Experience You Bring: 8–10+ years of product management experience, with deep focus in global or cross-border payments Proven track record of integrating PSPs and enabling local payment methods across multiple regions Strong technical fluency—you speak API, understand payment flows, and can collaborate closely with Engineering Deep knowledge of authorization, settlement, and reconciliation processes, plus a solid grasp of merchant/PSP dynamics Familiarity with compliance frameworks like PCI-DSS, PSD2, and regional invoicing mandates Strategic mindset with a sharp eye for data—you're comfortable defining metrics and making decisions based on insight Exceptional communication and collaboration skills across Product, Engineering, Compliance, and Finance teams Bonus: Experience with B2B SaaS or platform-based paymentsHave we piqued your curiosity?Sound like the role for you? We’d love to hear from you! Even if you’re not 100% sure about potential fit, we still encourage you to apply. We’re looking for the right person, not the perfect series of checkboxes.The Company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We highly value diversity at our company and encourage people of all different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives to apply. items.descriptionHtml:
About the Company:

At Playlist, life's richest moments happen when people step away from screens to move, connect, explore, and play. We're building the definitive platform for intentional living, connecting people with inspiring experiences in fitness, wellness, and beyond. With popular brands like Mindbody and ClassPass, Playlist empowers businesses and individuals, making it effortless for aspirations to become actions. Join us in reshaping technology's role to foster meaningful, real-world connections.

The Role You’ll Play:

At the intersection of technology and global wellness, you’ll lead our international payments expansion. This role is about more than integrations and regulations—it’s about creating seamless, compliant experiences that empower businesses to grow and thrive across borders.

  • Define and lead our global payments expansion strategy, aligning PSP integrations, market priorities, and compliance milestones
  • Launch local payment methods and regional PSPs across key markets, owning the process from evaluation to go-live
  • Build expertise in complex regulatory frameworks (like PSD2, Verifactu, NF525, and e-Invoicing), ensuring we stay ahead of local requirements
  • Partner with Engineering to shape the global payments stack, from multi-PSP orchestration to routing logic and risk controls
  • Collaborate with Compliance, Finance, and GTM teams to streamline reconciliation, settlement, and cross-border payouts
  • Set success metrics for payment acceptance, reliability, and cost efficiency across markets
  • Represent Payments in global initiatives, championing international enablement across product and platform teams
  • Stay plugged into global payments trends, using competitive insights to inform product direction and decision-making

____________________________________________________________________________________

Experience You Bring:

  • 8–10+ years of product management experience, with deep focus in global or cross-border payments
  • Proven track record of integrating PSPs and enabling local payment methods across multiple regions
  • Strong technical fluency—you speak API, understand payment flows, and can collaborate closely with Engineering
  • Deep knowledge of authorization, settlement, and reconciliation processes, plus a solid grasp of merchant/PSP dynamics
  • Familiarity with compliance frameworks like PCI-DSS, PSD2, and regional invoicing mandates
  • Strategic mindset with a sharp eye for data—you're comfortable defining metrics and making decisions based on insight
  • Exceptional communication and collaboration skills across Product, Engineering, Compliance, and Finance teams
  • Bonus: Experience with B2B SaaS or platform-based payments

Have we piqued your curiosity?

Sound like the role for you? We’d love to hear from you! Even if you’re not 100% sure about potential fit, we still encourage you to apply. We’re looking for the right person, not the perfect series of checkboxes.

The Company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We highly value diversity at our company and encourage people of all different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives to apply. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status, or other protected characteristics.

By entering your email and phone number and submitting your application, you consent to receive emails, calls and SMS about your application and other roles at The Company, including by auto-dialer. Message and data rates may apply. Opt-out or text STOP to cancel at any time. If you are a California resident or reside outside the United States then by submitting your application you confirm that you have read, understood, agree and - where applicable - grant your prior, free, informed and express consent for the processing of your personal information, including sensitive personal information, as described in our California Applicant Privacy Notice or International Applicant Privacy Notice (as applicable).

Note: This description outlines key responsibilities but isn’t intended to cover every task or duty. Additional responsibilities may be assigned as needed to support the team and business goals.

items.descriptionHtml:
About Intellect Design Arena


Intellect Design Arena is a global leader in financial technology, delivering advanced,

design-led products for banking and financial services. Built on our eMACH.ai

architecture, our platforms enable composable, contextual, and intelligent digital

experiences. Our flagship lending suite, Intellect Digital Lending (IDL), empowers

banks and financial institutions to deliver seamless, digital-first credit products across

retail, commercial, SME, and corporate lending.

We are looking for a Senior Product Manager – Lending who brings deep domain

expertise, strong strategic thinking, and end-to-end product leadership to elevate the

next generation of our lending product stack.


Key Responsibilities



1.Own and define the long-term strategy, vision, and positioning for the digital

lending portfolio (LOS, LMS, underwriting, credit decisioning, onboarding

workflows, and more).

2. Drive multi-year product roadmaps aligned with market trends, regulatory

evolution, and business objectives.

3.Conduct advanced market intelligence, competitor benchmarking, and

opportunity sizing to shape product differentiation and growth. End-to-End Product Lifecycle Ownership

4. Lead the full product lifecycle—from ideation, requirements, design, GTM

planning, delivery, adoption, to continuous iteration.

5. Shape product architecture and ensure alignment with modern principles such

as microservices, APIs, workflow orchestration, and cloud-native engineering.

6.Define high-quality product requirements, functional specifications, and release plans with clarity and precision.

7.Partner closely with engineering, design, architecture, customer success, and delivery to ensure predictable, high-quality product releases.

8.Domain Authority & Workflow Expertise

9. Demonstrate deep understanding of lending domain processes, including:

o Loan origination (retail, SME, corporate)

o Credit underwriting & risk assessment

o Loan servicing & lifecycle management

o Collateral management, limits, post-disbursement servicing

o Regulatory compliance and credit policy frameworks

10. Champion process excellence and workflow modernization across the product suite. Client & Stakeholder Leadership

11. Serve as the product’s domain expert and evangelist for internal teams,clients, and strategic partners.

12. Lead client discussions, solutioning workshops, and product demonstrations with strong business and domain credibility.

13. Gather, prioritize, and synthesize customer insights and market needs to drive meaningful product enhancements.

14. Collaborate with sales and pre-sales teams on strategic pursuits, RFPs, and

customer solution architecture. Innovation & Technology Integration

15. Identify and shape opportunities to integrate advanced technologies such as:


Qualifications & experience


1. 8–15 years of product management experience, with at least 5+ years in lending or fintech, managing complex enterprise platforms.

2. Proven ownership of enterprise-grade LOS, LMS, or digital lending products.

3, Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Finance, or related field.

4. MBA or equivalent business qualification strongly preferred.

Technical Expertise

5. Solid understanding of modern software architecture—APIs, microservices,

cloud, workflow engines, integration frameworks. Experience working in Agile environments with tools like Jira, Confluence, and product design/mock-up tools.

Domain Expertise

6.Comprehensive knowledge of the lending lifecycle, products, regulatory

environment, and credit/risk processes. Experience with retail, commercial, SME, or corporate lending workflows.

items.descriptionHtml:
About Emeritus


Emeritus is committed to teaching the skills of the future by making high-quality education accessible and affordable to individuals, companies, and governments around the world. It does this by collaborating with more than 80 top-tier universities across the United States, Europe, Latin America, Southeast Asia, India and China.


Emeritus’ short courses, degree programs, professional certificates, and senior executive programs help individuals learn new skills and transform their lives, companies and organizations. Its unique model of state-of-the-art technology, curriculum innovation, and hands-on instruction from senior faculty, mentors and coaches has educated more than 300,000 individuals across 80+ countries.


Founded in 2015, Emeritus, part of Eruditus Group, has more than 1,800 employees globally and offices in Mumbai, New Delhi, Shanghai, Singapore, Palo Alto, Mexico City, New York, Boston, London, and Dubai. The company is backed by prominent investors including Accel, SoftBank Vision Fund 2, the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, Leeds Illuminate, Prosus Ventures, Sequoia Capital India, and Bertelsmann.


About the Role


We are seeking a data-driven and experimentation-focused Product Manager – Growth to drive conversion optimization and user engagement across our digital experiences. This role requires an entrepreneurial mindset with a deep focus on improving web and mobile funnels, enhancing user interactions, and scaling impact through systematic experimentation and data-led decision making.

The ideal candidate combines strong product sense, analytical rigor, and cross-functional collaboration skills to optimize user journeys end-to-end, from landing pages to lead engagement touchpoints, while bringing a scalable, frameworks-first approach to growth initiatives.


Key Responsibilities


  • Own the end-to-end product lifecycle across our digital surfaces, from opportunity identification and hypothesis generation to experiment implementation and performance tracking.
  • Identify and unlock opportunities to improve conversion rates across the funnel, with sharp focus on drop-off points and engagement metrics.
  • Drive mobile-first optimization, ensuring performance, experience, and usability for a large base of mobile users.
  • Optimize and evolve all major web touchpoints, including Landing pages (pure and campaign-driven) / Category and product discovery pages / Microsites and sub-domain journeys
  • Elevate lead engagement and conversion mechanisms, such as: Chatbots and conversational flows / Advisor connectivity and lead response models / Page-level engagement elements and CTAs
  • Lead the design of scalable systems and frameworks to avoid ad hoc or one-off implementations and enable faster iteration across teams.
  • Establish and embed an experimentation culture by building frameworks for A/B testing and controlled rollouts across: Conversion rate optimization / Layouts, content hierarchy, and messaging / CTA placements and journey orchestration
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with design, marketing, growth, revenue and engineering teams to execute growth initiatives and drive measurable business impact.
  • Use data as the primary driver of decision-making, defining success metrics, setting up analytics instrumentation, and continuously iterating based on performance trends.
  • Bring a structured approach to prioritization and roadmap development, balancing quick wins with scalable, long-term initiatives.


Key Skills and Qualifications


  • 5–10 years of Product Management experience, preferably in growth, funnel optimization, or digital conversion roles.
  • Proven track record of driving measurable improvements in conversion, engagement, or retention metrics.
  • Deep understanding of web and mobile UX, including frameworks for testing and iterative enhancement.
  • Experience with A/B testing tools (e.g. Optimizely, VWO) and analytics tools (e.g., Mixpanel, GA4).
  • Comfortable working across web CMS environments, marketing technologies, and CRM tools.
  • Strong collaboration skills with cross-functional teams - engineering, design, marketing, data/analytics, and revenue.
  • Analytical mindset with the ability to translate insights into actionable hypotheses and experiments.
  • Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, with experience influencing strategy and execution across teams.
  • Strong bias for action, ownership, and measurable outcomes.
  • MBA or advanced degree preferred, though not mandatory for candidates with exceptional experience in growth or product optimization.


Emeritus provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.

items.descriptionHtml:
Role involves managing NRI Banking segment from a product management, marketing, compliance and business development to ensure higher customer engagement and customer wallet penetration


Overall Job Description


  • Managing NRI Banking product- Managing account features & relationship criteria related to NR SA product & charging structure.
  • Managing Processes and Identifying process improvement areas- Consistently drive initiatives to ensure operational efficiencies through liaising with various internal functions of the Bank
  • Identify new product opportunities and ensure successful launch of the same
  • Liaising with lifestyle partners and managing the offers for NRI Banking segment.
  • Ensuring that products and processes are in line with the Bank’s overall business objectives
  • Support the branch distribution teams and overseas teams on product / process related queries
  • Own and manage the NRI section of the Bank’s web-site
  • Ensuring that all operational processes, specifically KYC / AML, are in line the framework defined by The Reserve Bank of India from time to time
  • Ensuring monthly compliance & regulatory reporting for the NRI Business including overseas offices
  • Driving customer engagement initiatives to manage the existing customer portfolio to improve overall business efficiency
  • Driving growth of NRI customers and NRI banking Balance Sheet


Role requirement


  • Minimum 5 years of Prior experience in banking -NR Product, client engagement, marketing & campaign management
  • Ability to drive business strategies based on the data trends & analysis

items.descriptionHtml:
This role is for one of the Weekday's clients

Salary range: Rs 1500000 - Rs 4600000 (ie INR 15-46 LPA)

Experience: 8+ yrs

Location: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune

Job Type: full-time

We are looking for a seasoned Product Manager to lead the development of a next-generation automation and agent orchestration platform. This role sits at the intersection of product strategy, platform engineering, and AI-driven automation, where you will define and scale systems that power intelligent workflows, agent lifecycle management, and enterprise-grade automation capabilities.

The ideal candidate will own the product vision end-to-end, driving reliability, scalability, and measurable business outcomes across automation pipelines and platform adoption. You will work closely with engineering, data science, and operations teams to build a robust, API-driven platform that enables seamless orchestration of tasks, agents, and workflows at scale.

This is a high-impact leadership role requiring strong technical depth, strategic thinking, and the ability to engage with senior stakeholders including CXOs.

Requirements

Key Responsibilities

  • Own and drive the product roadmap for the automation and agent orchestration platform
  • Define the long-term product vision including agent lifecycle, skill registry, orchestration patterns, and monitoring frameworks
  • Design system guardrails including human-in-the-loop workflows, confidence scoring, and intelligent routing mechanisms
  • Establish and optimize product success metrics including automation funnel (Task Volume → Attempted → Processed → Completed)
  • Write detailed PRDs and translate complex requirements into clear engineering deliverables
  • Lead sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and cross-functional execution with engineering, data science, and operations teams
  • Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure successful client onboarding and production go-lives
  • Present product strategy, progress, and outcomes to senior leadership and CXO-level stakeholders
  • Mentor associate product managers and analysts to build strong product execution capabilities
  • Continuously identify opportunities to improve platform reliability, efficiency, and scalability
  • Work closely with technical teams to ensure high-quality API design and distributed system architecture alignment

What Makes You a Great Fit

  • 8-12 years of product management experience with at least 3+ years in platform, infrastructure, or developer-facing products
  • Strong experience building products around APIs, orchestration systems, workflows, or automation platforms
  • Deep understanding of distributed systems, microservices architecture, and system observability
  • Strong analytical mindset with experience defining metrics, building funnels, and driving root-cause analysis
  • Proven ability to write clear, structured PRDs and simplify complex technical concepts for execution
  • Excellent stakeholder management skills with experience engaging CXO-level leadership
  • Experience working on automation, RPA, workflow engines, or agent-based systems is highly preferred
  • Exposure to AI/ML product ecosystems including LLMs, NLP, document intelligence, or MLOps is a strong plus
  • Familiarity with cloud AI platforms and modern data/AI infrastructure is an advantage
  • Strong leadership skills with experience mentoring junior product talent
  • Ability to thrive in fast-paced, ambiguous, and high-ownership environments

items.descriptionHtml:
Job Title: Product Manager - Storefront

Location: Mumbai

Experience: Min 5 years overall(2-3 years in Product)

Role Overview

We are looking for a highly driven and analytical Storefront Product Manager to own and enhance the end-to-end customer experience across our digital storefront.

This role requires someone who can seamlessly work across multiple storefront touchpoints — including Search, Homepage, Merchandising, Product Detail Page (PDP), Cart, and related user journeys — ensuring a high-performing, data-driven, and outcome-focused product ecosystem.

The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, comfortable with data, and passionate about delivering measurable business impact beyond feature releases.

Key Responsibilities

  • Storefront Ownership Lead product initiatives across the Storefront ecosystem including Search, Homepage, merchandising modules, PDP, Cart, and checkout funnel. Identify friction points in the user journey and improve conversion, discovery, and overall user experience. Partner with Design, Engineering, Growth, and Business teams to conceptualize and execute enhancements.
  • Data-Driven Decision Making Use analytics and structured experimentation to identify opportunities, diagnose issues, and validate hypotheses. Design and analyze A/B tests, interpret results, and translate insights into actionable product improvements. Track and own key storefront metrics such as conversion rate, CTR, cart additions, bounce rates, engagement, and revenue impact.
  • Analytics & SQL Proficiency Independently work with large datasets using SQL to extract insights. Build dashboards and collaborate with analytics teams to ensure data accuracy and availability. Leverage data to prioritize initiatives and influence roadmap decisions.
  • Outcome Ownership Go beyond feature delivery — take full ownership of business impact and performance metrics. Define success metrics upfront and ensure measurable improvements post-launch. Continuously optimize features post-deployment to maximize ROI.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration Work closely with Engineering to translate product requirements into scalable solutions. Partner with Design to ensure intuitive and seamless user experience. Coordinate with marketing, merchandising, and operations teams for aligned execution.

Required Qualifications & Experience

Overall 5 years and Min 3 years of Product Management experience, preferably in e-commerce or consumer internet platforms.

Strong analytical skills with hands-on experience in SQL and data analysis.

Demonstrated track record of using data to drive product decisions and measurable impact.

Experience running and analyzing A/B experiments.

High attention to detail and strong problem-solving ability.

Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Preferred Attributes

Experience managing high-traffic consumer platforms.

Strong understanding of conversion funnel optimization.

Customer-first mindset with strong business acumen.

Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

What We’re Looking For

Someone Who

✔ Thinks in metrics, not just features

✔ Loves solving user discovery & conversion problems

✔ Can move from insight → hypothesis → experiment → impact

✔ Takes ownership beyond launch

We are hiring for leading General Insurance Company.


Position Title: Manager / Senior – Product Manager

Department: Product Development

Location: Head Office, Mumbai

Reporting To: Associate Vice President

Experience: Minimum 5+ years of experience in General Insurance, preferably in Product Development.


Role Overview

The role involves managing the end-to-end product development lifecycle for lifestyle insurance products, including conceptualization, product design, regulatory filing, product modifications, value-added services (VAS), and successful market launch. The incumbent will work closely with multiple internal stakeholders to ensure timely execution, regulatory compliance, and innovation in product offerings.


Product Development & Filing

  • Design and develop new lifestyle insurance products and enhance existing offerings.
  • Prepare and manage product filing documentation in line with regulatory requirements.
  • Ensure readiness and completion of all product filing activities.

Product Governance & Compliance

  • Ensure adherence to Product Filing Guidelines, IRDAI regulations, and internal Product Development SOPs.
  • Support monthly Product Governance Council reporting and governance activities.
  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams including Underwriting, Actuarial, Compliance, Legal, Risk, Claims, Marketing, and Sales.

Regulatory & Operational Compliance

  • Ensure all regulatory and compliance-related activities are completed within defined timelines.
  • Facilitate system readiness, launch governance, and query management processes.

Product Innovation & Market Intelligence

  • Identify and implement innovative product propositions and enhancements.
  • Conduct market scans to track new product launches and emerging trends within the Indian insurance market.

Product Launch Management

  • Oversee end-to-end product launch activities, including:
  • System requirement finalization

items.descriptionHtml:
Business Function

Global Transaction Services (GTS) is a product group focused on the management and sale of Cash Management, Trade Finance, and Securities & Fiduciary products and services to institutional clients.


Job Purpose

  • To manage and develop differentiated Current account liability solutions for Corporate and SME customers.
  • To develop and offer cash management solutions to partner banks
  • To strengthen the features and functionalities offered in order to attract value-based customers.
  • To develop an acquisition strategy optimizing product value & profitability.
  • In addition, the role will entail additional responsibilities for developing and managing cash management payments & collection products

Key Accountabilities

  • Grow liabilities business solutions for SME/MSME customers through tailormade and differentiated liability solution as per regulatory & business requirements with consultation of legal, compliance and other stakeholders.
  • Drive lifecycle management of payments, collections, and current account solutions
  • Regulatory & NPCI Engagement
  • Develop and manage cash management services to offer to partner banks.
  • Effectively manage projects of all new Product Rollouts. To ensure that all applicable approvals are in place before product roll out. In addition, documentation, procedures, pricing, marketing collateral etc. as applicable needs to be prepared and finalised prior to the Product rollout.
  • Commercialise all Product rollouts. This includes training to all relevant stakeholders as well as sales campaigns / sales packs to drive product usage. To track revenue generation / benefit realisation and compare with the Product Plan / Objectives. Generation and dissemination of all relevant MIS to all relevant stakeholders. Also to support sales in complex sales pitches.
  • Support and manage special projects (such as deposit generation initiatives etc.) which are floated from time to time. Special projects to be determined in consultation with Team Lead or Head Cash Management.
  • Establish profile of the Bank as a cash management provider in India. Undertake frequent competitor analysis and share with Team Lead and Head Cash Management so that DBS Cash Management offering is in line with competing banks. Also identify local promotional activities and share the same with Team Lead and Head Cash Management which will help reinforce DBS Cash Management brand.


Job Duties & responsibilities


  • Develop and implement customer centric services/products by understanding market dynamics, customer segmentation & mapping competition matrix. Continuously analyze and update competition matrix
  • Control and periodically check operational risks and workflow thereby implement a sound process.
  • Develop & implement Management Information System (MIS) to control and monitor performance of product, operating expenditure & service levels.
  • Strong experience in cash management + payments ecosystem (UPI, NACH, RTGS, NEFT)
  • Proven exposure to regulatory interactions (RBI / NPCI)
  • Manage fee structure, create opportunities for income generation and minimize revenue leakage


Required Experience

  • Experience in liabilities business for SME customers.
  • Good understanding of the product management process through prior cash management

experience of at least 5-8 years.

Market knowledge and experience of Cash Management business, with reference to customer preferences and requirements, would be preferable.


Education / Preferred Qualifications

An MBA or Chartered Accountant or equivalent degree is preferable, with 8 years of banking/product knowledge & at least 5 years specifically in cash management

Core Competencies

  • Proven expertise is liabilities, cash management.
  • Sound technical knowledge of Product cash management business
  • Good problem solving/analytical, planning & organising skills. Planning, scheduling and monitoring deliverables, within a stipulated time frame using effective methods
  • Good team management skills / working with multiple stakeholders
  • Good interpersonal and communications skills.


Technical Competencies

  • In-depth understanding of cash management products and associated technology platforms and operational procedures
  • Experience of dealing with partner banks, vendors and technology providers as well as understanding industry dynamics
  • Understanding of regulatory guidelines on banking issued by MAS and by RBI (local regulations in India) and local laws and regulations that impact businesses in general.
  • Knowledge of financial markets and products.


Work Relationship

  • Possess good working relationship and a high degree of team spirit and cooperation with relationship group as well as service partners in the bank such as Product Mgt, Operations, Finance, Legal etc, so as to ensure seamless delivery of products to clients
  • Establish rapport with our clients so as to win their business, confidence Possess good working relationship and a high degree of team spirit and cooperation with service partners in the bank such as Technology, Operations, GTS - Singapore etc. as well as relationship groups, viz., FIG, EBG and IBG so as to ensure seamless delivery of products to our clients and business growth and smooth functioning of the branch as a whole.
  • Establish good contacts with industry players, particularly partner banks and vendors


DBS India - Culture & Behaviors

  • Drive Performance Through Value Based Propositions
  • Ensure Customer Focus by Delighting Customers & Reduce Complaints
  • Build Pride and Passion to Protect, Maintain and Enhance DBS’ Reputation
  • Enhance Knowledge Base, Build Skill Sets & Develop Competencies
  • Invest in Team Building & Motivation through Ideation & Innovation
  • Execute at Speed While Maintaining Error Free Operations
  • Develop a Passion for Performance to Grow Talent Pool
  • Maintain the Highest Standards of Honesty and In
