items.descriptionHtml:
Job Requirements

About the Role

The Program Manager – Two-Wheeler Loans is responsible for overseeing the vision, development, and lifecycle of the two-wheeler loan product. This role involves managing customer journeys, coordinating with sales and technical teams, and ensuring seamless project execution—from scoping to go-live and adoption. The incumbent will drive innovation through automation, API integrations, and user experience enhancements, while ensuring compliance and system stability. The role is pivotal in scaling the business and improving onboarding journeys for both customers and internal users.

Key Responsibilities

Primary Responsibilities

  • Drive book growth by implementing new policies and credit decisioning frameworks for Two-Wheeler Loans.
  • Lead sprint planning and management for product journey development, design, and go-live.
  • Manage end-to-end project execution for existing and new customer onboarding journeys, including loan origination and booking processes.
  • Ensure timely delivery of projects as per the annual roadmap and predefined timelines.
  • Benchmark and implement industry best practices across all customer journeys.
  • Maintain system stability to ensure uninterrupted business operations.
  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders to develop and execute implementation plans for new partnerships.
  • Recommend and implement process automation to improve service efficiency.
  • Liaise with the tech team for successful integration with external partners to achieve faster turnaround times and improved processes.
  • Work closely with risk teams to ensure all technology builds are compliant with regulatory and internal standards.

Secondary Responsibilities

  • Monitor and prevent unethical practices, and continuously improve customer journeys.
  • Identify new development requirements to enhance user experience and support business scale-up.

What We Are Looking For

Education

  • Graduation: B.Sc, B.Tech, BCA, B.Com, or BBA.
  • Post-graduation: MBA or PGDM.

Experience

  • Minimum 4 years of relevant experience in product or program management, preferably in vehicle finance or consumer lending.

Skills and Attributes

  • Strong project management and sprint planning capabilities.
  • Deep understanding of loan origination systems and customer onboarding journeys.
  • Technical proficiency in API integrations, automation, and UI/UX development.
  • Excellent stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration skills.
  • Ability to translate business needs into technical requirements.
  • High attention to detail, compliance orientation, and execution focus.

items.descriptionHtml:
Role Overview

We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Product & Program Manager to lead the strategy, development, and delivery of digital banking channels for corporate clients. This role will focus on Mobility Banking, Beyond Banking, and Embedded Banking solutions, ensuring seamless integration, superior user experience, and alignment with business objectives.

Key Responsibilities

Product Management

  • Define product vision, roadmap, and strategy for digital channels catering to corporate customers.
  • Conduct market research, competitor analysis, and customer feedback sessions to identify opportunities and gaps.
  • Drive innovation in digital banking solutions, including mobile apps, web platforms, and API-based connected banking.
  • Collaborate with UX/UI teams to ensure intuitive and secure user experiences.
  • Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and internal risk frameworks.

Program Management

  • Lead end-to-end program execution for digital initiatives, including planning, budgeting, and resource allocation.
  • Manage cross-functional teams (IT, Operations, Compliance, Marketing) to deliver projects on time and within scope.
  • Track KPIs and performance metrics for digital channels; implement continuous improvement strategies.
  • Oversee vendor relationships and third-party integrations for connected banking solutions.

Stakeholder Management

  • Act as the primary liaison between business units, technology teams, and external partners.
  • Present product updates, business cases, and progress reports to senior leadership.

Technology & Innovation

  • Stay abreast of emerging technologies in digital banking (APIs, AI, blockchain, cybersecurity).
  • Drive adoption of open banking and connected banking frameworks for corporate clients.

Qualifications & Skills

  • Education: MBA / PG or equivalent in Business/Finance/Technology.
  • Experience: 3-5 years in product management/program management within banking or fintech; experience in corporate banking digital channels preferred.
  • Strong understanding of transaction banking, cash management, and corporate payment ecosystems.
  • Expertise in Agile methodologies, digital transformation, Artificial Intelligence (AI) and API-driven platforms.
  • Excellent communication, collaboration, stakeholder management, and leadership skills.
  • Knowledge and Practical Application of AI is preferred
  • Knowledge of regulatory compliance and cybersecurity best practices.

Key Competencies

  • Strategic thinking and problem-solving.
  • Customer-centric approach
  • Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Product Managers / Senior Product Managers (Multiple Therapy Areas)

Client: Top-Tier Multinational Pharmaceutical (MNC) Company

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra

Employment Type: Full-Time

About the Client: Our client is a globally recognized, top-tier Pharmaceutical MNC known for its cutting-edge innovations, robust pipeline, and life-changing therapies. We are partnering with them to build out their marketing leadership across three critical business units.

Open Vacancies & Compensation: We are currently hiring for 5 distinct Product Management roles across the following divisions. (Note: Designation—PM or Sr. PM—will be commensurate with experience and the approved budget.)

  • Ophthalmology Division (2 Vacancies) * Role 1 Budget: Up to ₹15,00,000 (15 LPA)
  • Role 2 Budget: Up to ₹20,00,000 (20 LPA)
  • Respiratory Devices Division (1 Vacancy)
  • Budget: Up to ₹20,00,000 (20 LPA)
  • Cardiology Division (2 Vacancies)
  • Role 1 Budget: Up to ₹20,00,000 (20 LPA)
  • Role 2 Budget: Up to ₹30,00,000 (30 LPA)

Key Responsibilities:

  • Brand Strategy & Execution: Develop, implement, and drive comprehensive brand plans and marketing strategies to achieve market share and revenue targets for assigned portfolios.
  • KOL Engagement: Build and maintain strong, strategic relationships with Key Opinion Leaders, top specialists, and medical associations within your specific therapeutic area.
  • Field Force Enablement: Design high-impact promotional materials, digital campaigns, and deliver rigorous scientific/marketing training to the sales force.
  • Market Intelligence: Conduct continuous market research to analyze competitor activities, patient demographics, and emerging clinical trends to pivot strategies effectively.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Medical Affairs, Regulatory, Sales Leadership, and Supply Chain to ensure seamless product lifecycle management and market access.

Candidate Requirements:

  • Education: B.Pharm / B.Sc in a relevant science discipline. A Master’s degree or MBA from a premier institute is highly preferred.
  • Experience: * Proven track record in pharmaceutical or medical device product management.
  • Strict Requirement: Candidates must have direct, relevant marketing experience in the specific therapeutic area they are applying for (Ophthalmology, Respiratory Devices, or Cardiology).
  • Years of experience expected will vary based on the target budget (e.g., 3-5 years for the 15L brackets, up to 8-12+ years for the 30L bracket).
  • Skills: Strong analytical acumen, exceptional presentation/communication skills, and a demonstrated ability to drive high-value brands in a highly competitive market.
  • Location: Must be based in Mumbai or willing to relocate immediately.

Email: sayan.mal.recruits@gmail.com

items.descriptionHtml:
Hiring Alert: Derivative Product Manager at Arihant Capital!


If you thrive at the intersection of trading, technology, and product ownership—and love building products traders actually use—this one’s for you.


Arihant Capital Markets Limited is a trusted name in India’s capital markets, committed to building powerful, reliable, and compliant trading platforms for active traders and investors. We’re focused on creating products that are fast, intuitive, and built with deep market understanding.

To power the next phase of our growth, we’re looking for a Derivative Product Manager who can take complete ownership of derivative trading products across mobile and web. This is a high-impact role for someone who doesn’t just manage roadmaps—but builds, launches, and scales products end-to-end.


This is not a coordination-only role. You will take product decisions, work hands-on with engineering and growth teams, and own outcomes.


The role:


Product Strategy & Ownership

Own the vision, roadmap, and strategy for derivative trading products. Take complete ownership of the assigned module, including P&L. Identify user needs, market opportunities, and competitive gaps to drive product success.


Product Development


Work closely with engineering, design, QA, and marketing to deliver high-quality trading features. Prepare BRDs/PRDs, functional specs, user journeys, and workflows. Drive development of critical trading capabilities including order types, positions & holdings, margin & risk management, market data & charts, option chain, payoff graphs, algo strategies, reports, and compliance features.


Market Analysis

Stay deeply plugged into market trends, regulations, and competitive landscape. Translate insights into product decisions that create real trader value.


Mobile & Web Platforms

Ensure a seamless, reliable, and consistent experience across mobile apps and web platforms. Continuously optimize performance, usability, and stability.


Go-To-Market & Growth

Define and execute GTM strategies for new launches. Post-launch, track KPIs, analyze user behavior, and work with growth teams to improve adoption, engagement, and retention.


Stakeholder Management

Act as the single point of contact for the derivative product module. Communicate clearly with leadership and stakeholders, and collaborate closely with sales, operations, finance, and external partners.


Financial Analysis

Assess product profitability and viability. Work with finance teams on pricing strategies and revenue optimization.


You fit right in if you have:


  • 5–10 years of experience as a Product Manager in trading
  • Strong domain expertise in F&O, margins, Greeks, risk management, and order lifecycle
  • Hands-on experience with mobile and web trading platforms
  • Ability to write clear, detailed BRDs / PRDs
  • Data-driven mindset with strong analytical skills
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities
  • Experience in broking, fintech, or capital market platforms (preferred)
  • Exposure to regulatory and compliance requirements (preferred)
  • Engineering graduate from a reputed college (preferred)


📍Location: Mumbai

🔗Apply now: https://lnkd.in/dXkuUsBS

items.descriptionHtml:
Job Requirements

Job Requirements

About Godrej Industries Group (GIG)

At the Godrej Industries Group, we are privileged to serve over 1.1 billion consumers globally through our businesses with market leadership positions in the consumer products, real estate, agriculture, financial services and chemicals industries.

www.godrejindustries.com

About The Role

We are looking for a high-calibre individual with experience in HR tech transformation and COE design at scale, or as a product manager in a technology environment. The role requires strong strategic thinking, hands-on execution, and the ability to operate both at depth and at scale.

As a People Product Manager, you will work at the intersection of HR, technology, and business to design and deliver impactful people solutions, specifically in the areas of Performance, Engagement, Rewards and People Analytics.

This is a unique opportunity to solve product-grade problems in HR, as technology reshapes the future of work.

Key Responsibilities

  • Product Vision: Define and articulate a clear product vision and strategy that aligns with company goals and customer needs.
  • Market Research: Conduct thorough market research to identify trends, opportunities, and competitive landscape, translating findings into actionable product insights.
  • User-Centric Design: Advocate for a user-centric approach in product development, gathering feedback from users to inform feature prioritization and design.
  • Roadmap Development: Create and maintain a product roadmap, ensuring alignment with business objectives and prioritizing features based on impact and feasibility.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate with IT, HR, business teams ensure successful product development and launch.
  • Metrics and Analysis: Define key performance indicators (KPIs) for product success and analyze system performance data to drive continuous improvement.
  • Stakeholder Communication: Communicate product vision, progress, and updates to stakeholders, ensuring alignment and transparency throughout the product lifecycle
  • Own design-deployment-adoption of product lifecycle including implementation and project management at scale
  • HR Domain Expertise: Exposure to one or more areas such as Performance, Engagement, Rewards, or People Analytics will be preferred

Work Experience

6–8 years

Benefits

Whats in it for you?

Be an equal parent

Maternity support, including paid leave ahead of statutory guidelines, and flexible work options on return

Paternity support, including paid leave

New mothers can bring a caregiver and children under a year old, on work travel

Adoption support; gender neutral and based on the primary caregiver, with paid leave options

No place for discrimination at Godrej

Gender-neutral anti-harassment policy

Same sex partner benefits at par with married spouses

Gender transition support

We Are Selfish About Your Wellness

Comprehensive health insurance plans, as well as accident coverage for you and your family, with top-up options

Trust based sick leave

Mental wellness and self-care programmes, resources and counselling

Celebrating wins, the Godrej Way

Structured recognition platforms for individual, team and business-level achievements

Performance-based earning opportunities

An inclusive Godrej

Before you go, there is something important we want to highlight. There is no place for discrimination at Godrej. Diversity is the philosophy of who we are as a company. And has been for over a century. Its not just in our DNA and nice to do. Being more diverse - especially having our team members reflect the diversity of our businesses and communities - helps us innovate better and grow faster. We hope this resonates with you.

We take pride in being an equal opportunities employer. We recognise merit and encourage diversity. We do not tolerate any form of discrimination on the basis of nationality, race, colour, religion, caste, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, disability, age, or marital status and ensure equal opportunities for all our team members.

If this sounds like a role for you, apply now!

We look forward to meeting you.

items.descriptionHtml:
At Capgemini Invent, we believe difference drives change. As inventive transformation consultants, we blend our strategic, creative and scientific capabilities, collaborating closely with clients to deliver cutting-edge solutions. Join us to drive transformation tailored to our client's challenges of today and tomorrow. Informed and validated by science and data. Superpowered by creativity and design. All underpinned by technology created with purpose.

Your Role

  • Own the end-to-end product lifecycle for AI-driven products and capabilities, from problem discovery and requirement definition through delivery and user adoption. Lead business requirement gathering and solution shaping by engaging with stakeholders through workshops, interviews, and working sessions.
  • Convert business problems into clear, actionable product and functional requirements, ensuring clarity, feasibility, and alignment with product objectives. Provide functional leadership to cross-functional delivery teams, including Business Analysts, developers, data scientists, and ML engineers.
  • Guide and review the outputs of Business Analysts, ensuring high-quality documentation, traceability, and alignment with business intent. Act as the central point of collaboration between business, data, and technology teams, balancing priorities, constraints, and delivery timelines.
  • Apply agile ways of working pragmatically to support incremental delivery and prioritization; formal scrum practices and ceremonies are leveraged where appropriate but not rigidly enforced. Translate AI and GenAI concepts into meaningful product features, including Large Language Model (LLM)–based solution, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) approaches, Embeddings, semantic search, and knowledge retrieval
  • Ensure AI solutions adhere to enterprise data governance, security, and compliance standards, working closely with data and architecture teams. Contribute to product roadmap definition, release planning, dependency management, and value realization tracking. Act as a trusted partner to senior stakeholders, supporting decision-making through clear articulation of trade-offs, risks, and outcomes

Your Profile

  • 7+ years of experience in Product Management or Product Owner roles delivering enterprise technology solutions. Strong experience in requirement gathering, analysis, and solution design for complex business and technology initiatives. Proven leadership and coordination skills, with experience managing and influencing teams of Business Analysts and developers.
  • Practical understanding of AI/ML and Generative AI concepts, including how modern AI products are designed and delivered in production environments. Ability to work effectively across business, data, and engineering teams, translating between technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Awareness of Data Governance principles, including data quality, access control, lineage, and responsible use of data in AI solutions. Experience working in large enterprise or consulting environments with multiple stakeholders and dependencies.
  • Should be able to define and measure the value proposition of AI and ensure AI initiatives deliver ROI value. Exposure to enterprise Generative AI platforms, AI assistants, or internal analytics products.
  • Familiarity with Agile / Scrum methodologies; certification is beneficial but not mandatory. Understanding AI ethics, model limitations, and responsible AI considerations. Experience engaging with senior leadership or CXO-level stakeholders

What You Will Love About Working Here

  • We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
  • At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
  • Equip yourself with valuable certifications in the latest technologies such as Generative AI.

Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.
